reason: The item cleanly targets a single expert judgment: whether contrasting 298 K desorption kinetics make a dual sensing/retention use-case physically admissible, plus one kinetics-based added capability for staging thermal runaway. It has strong discriminative value because it rewards boundary-aware reasoning (fast CO2 desorption vs effectively permanent CO retention) while penalizing common misattributions (e.g., band-gap or generic “selectivity” claims), though response grading may be somewhat sensitive to wording since it is short-answer without explicit numeric anchors in the prompt.
